title: Hello World
text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment

title: Android多语言
text: 一、添加多语言资源在Values下二、更新Configuration中的locale属性1234567//更改语言 返回主Activity即IsOpenLocationActivityResources resources = LanguageActivity.this.getResources();DisplayMetrics dm = resources.getDisplayMetrics();Configuration config = resources.getConfiguration();// 应用用户选择语言config.locale = UtilTool.getLanguage();resources.updateConfiguration(config, dm); 三、重启Activity123Intent intent = new Intent(LanguageActivity.this, IsOpenLocationActivity.class);intent.setFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK | Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TASK);startActivity(intent); 四、持久化存储12345Resources resources = mContext.getResources();DisplayMetrics dm = resources.getDisplayMetrics();Configuration config = resources.getConfiguration();config.locale = UtilTool.getLanguage();resources.updateConfiguration(config, dm);
